meta.question: Which packages are sub-packages of the APS Conceptaul Design?
meta.finalAnswer:
The APS Conceptual Design package (located at TMT::Project::Work Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment and Phasing System::Systems Engineering::01 Components::Operational::APS::Conceptual Design) has **43 sub-packages**. Here are the direct and nested sub-packages:

**Top-level sub-packages:**
- Components
- Interchange functions
- PEAS Algorithms
- Signals

**Under "Signals":**
- APS External (with sub-packages: Cmd_APT, Cmd_BSS, Cmd_CommonService, Cmd_ExecutiveSW, Cmd_KMirror, Cmd_M1CS, Cmd_M3CS, Cmd_PIT_Camera, Cmd_SH, Cmd_ShearPlate, Cmd_Stimulus, Cmd_TCS, PEAS-CC, PEAS-CommonService, PEAS-M1CS, PEAS-M3CS, PEAS-TCS)
- APS Internal (with sub-packages: BeamSplitterStage, Cmd_InternalSource, Control, PEAS-CC, PEAS-ExecutiveSW, PEAS-Internal, PEAS-PIT-Camera)

**Under "Interchange functions":**
- External (with sub-packages: Cmd_M1CS, Cmd_TCS)
- Internal (with sub-packages: Cmd_InternalSource)
- Operator

**Other packages:**
- Calibration Elevations Lookup Table
- Configuration Tables

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?pkg ?name WHERE {
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS Conceptual Design")))
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: No direct match for "APS Conceptual Design". Trying partial match with CONTAINS to find similar package names.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?pkg ?name WHERE {
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?pkg ?name WHERE {
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Conceptual")) && CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")))
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>

request.reason: Found "Conceptual Design" packages. The one under APS path is the target. Now need to find its sub-packages using Package_packagedElement or Element_ownedElement.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?subPkg ?name WHERE {
  ?subPkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?subPkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?subPkg), "APS") && CONTAINS(STR(?subPkg), "Conceptual%20Design"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?subPkg ?name WHERE {
  ?subPkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?subPkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?subPkg), "APS"))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?subPkg), "Conceptual"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?subPkg ?name WHERE {
  ?subPkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?subPkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  ?subPkg vocab:Element_owner ?parent .
  ?parent vocab:NamedElement_name "Conceptual Design" .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?parent), "APS"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?subPkg ?name WHERE {
  ?subPkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?subPkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?subPkg), "http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/package/TMT::Project::Work%20Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%20and%20Phasing%20System::Systems%20Engineering::01%20Components::Operational::APS::Conceptual%20Design::"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?subPkg ?name WHERE {
  ?subPkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?subPkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(STR(?subPkg) != "http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/package/TMT::Project::Work%20Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%20and%20Phasing%20System::Systems%20Engineering::01%20Components::Operational::APS::Conceptual%20Design")
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?subPkg), "APS::Conceptual%20Design::"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?parent ?parentName WHERE {
  ?parent rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?parent vocab:NamedElement_name ?parentName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?parent), "APS::Conceptual%20Design"))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?parent), "Operational::APS"))
}
LIMIT 10

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?owner ?ownerName WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "Signals" .
  ?elem vocab:Element_owner ?owner .
  ?owner vocab:NamedElement_name ?ownerName .
}
LIMIT 10

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?pkg ?name ?owned ?ownedName WHERE {
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "Conceptual Design" .
  ?pkg vocab:Package_packagedElement ?owned .
  ?owned rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?owned vocab:NamedElement_name ?ownedName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?pkg), "APS"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?pkg ?name WHERE {
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(STR(?pkg) = "http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/package/TMT::Project::Work%20Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%20and%20Phasing%20System::Systems%20Engineering::01%20Components::Operational::APS::Conceptual%20Design")
}
LIMIT 5
